item.title: Surgical management of metastatic cutaneous Crohn's disease: a case series from a tertiary centre in the United Kingdom.
item.description: Techniques in coloproctology - Metastatic Crohn's disease (MCD) is a rare extra-intestinal manifestation (EIM) of Crohn's disease (CD), defined by granulomatous inflammation of skin non-contiguous to the gastrointestinal tract. ...
